choose.when: AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId})
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId})
choose.otherwise: AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM residence rs WHERE rs.person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(rs.region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(a.applicant_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)))

mapper.sql: p.person_id,p.name,p.gender,p.birth_date,p.id_card AS masked_identity_no,p.phone AS masked_phone,p.current_status_code AS person_status,r.household_id,h.household_no,hp.name AS head_person_name,hm.relationship,CASE WHEN h.head_person_id=p.person_id THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS household_head,r.region_code AS current_region_code,NULL AS current_region_name,r.registered_address AS current_address,r.status AS residence_status,f.floating_id,f.status AS floating_status,f.arrival_date,rp.permit_id,rp.permit_no AS masked_permit_no,rp.status AS permit_status,rp.valid_until AS permit_valid_until,(SELECT x.direction FROM (SELECT 'IN' AS direction,mi.in_date AS business_date FROM migration_in mi WHERE mi.person_id=p.person_id AND mi.business_status='COMPLETED' UNION ALL SELECT 'OUT' AS direction,mo.out_date AS business_date FROM migration_out mo WHERE mo.person_id=p.person_id AND mo.business_status='COMPLETED') x ORDER BY x.business_date DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_migration_direction,(SELECT MAX(x.business_date) FROM (SELECT mi.in_date AS business_date FROM migration_in mi WHERE mi.person_id=p.person_id AND mi.business_status='COMPLETED' UNION ALL SELECT mo.out_date AS business_date FROM migration_out mo WHERE mo.person_id=p.person_id AND mo.business_status='COMPLETED') x) AS last_migration_date

FROM person p LEFT JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id AND r.status='ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN household h ON h.household_id=r.household_id LEFT JOIN person hp ON hp.person_id=h.head_person_id LEFT JOIN household_member hm ON hm.household_id=r.household_id AND hm.person_id=p.person_id AND hm.status='ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN floating_population f ON f.person_id=p.person_id AND f.status='ACTIVE' AND f.current_flag=1 LEFT JOIN residence_permit rp ON rp.person_id=p.person_id AND rp.status='ACTIVE' AND rp.current_flag=1

where.if: AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR p.id_card LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR h.household_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR rp.permit_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))

mapper.select: SELECT h.household_id,h.household_no,hp.name AS head_person_name,hm.relationship,CASE WHEN h.head_person_id=#{personId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS household_head,h.status,h.address,h.region_code FROM residence r JOIN household h ON h.household_id=r.household_id LEFT JOIN person hp ON hp.person_id=h.head_person_id LEFT JOIN household_member hm ON hm.household_id=h.household_id AND hm.person_id=#{personId} AND hm.status='ACTIVE' WHERE r.person_id=#{personId} AND r.status='ACTIVE'
SELECT residence_id,person_id,household_id,registered_address,region_code,register_type_code,register_date,start_date,status FROM residence WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND status='ACTIVE'

SELECT floating_id,registration_no,status,current_region_code,current_address,arrival_date,planned_leave_date FROM floating_population WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND status='ACTIVE' AND current_flag=1
SELECT permit_id,permit_no AS masked_permit_no,status,issue_region_code,valid_from,valid_until FROM residence_permit WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND status='ACTIVE' AND current_flag=1

SELECT x.direction,x.migration_id,x.migration_type,x.business_date,x.from_region_code,x.to_region_code,x.address,x.business_status FROM (SELECT 'IN' AS direction,in_id AS migration_id,migration_type,in_date AS business_date,from_region_code,to_region_code,from_address AS address,business_status FROM migration_in WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND business_status='COMPLETED' UNION ALL SELECT 'OUT' AS direction,out_id AS migration_id,migration_type,out_date AS business_date,from_region_code,to_region_code,to_address AS address,business_status FROM migration_out WHERE person_id=#{personId} AND business_status='COMPLETED') x ORDER BY x.business_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}
